Getting Started
Introduction Authentication
Endpoints
Chat API Inbox API CRM API Activity API Actions API
Integrations
Webhooks Widget SDK
Reference
Rate Limits

Ailyn API Documentation

Build AI-powered customer interactions with a simple REST API.

Getting Started

The Ailyn API lets you send messages, read conversations, manage contacts, and trigger automations programmatically.

Base URL

https://api.ailyn.app/v1

Get your API Key

Navigate to Dashboard → Settings → API Keys and click Create Key. Your key starts with ak_.

Keep your API key secret. Never expose it in client-side code. Use environment variables in production.

Authentication

All requests require a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

cURL
JavaScript
# Include in every request
curl https://api.ailyn.app/v1/inbox \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ak_your_key_here"
const res = await fetch('https://api.ailyn.app/v1/inbox', {
  headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${API_KEY}` }
});
const data = await res.json();
HeaderValueRequired
AuthorizationBearer ak_xxxxYes
Content-Typeapplication/jsonFor POST/PUT

Chat API

POST /v1/chat

Send a message to the AI assistant and receive a response. Supports streaming.

ParameterTypeDescription
messagestringThe user message
conversation_idstring?Continue existing conversation
streamboolean?Enable SSE streaming (default false)
metadataobject?Custom metadata to attach
cURL
JavaScript
Response
curl -X POST https://api.ailyn.app/v1/chat \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ak_xxxx" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "message": "How do I reset my password?",
    "conversation_id": "conv_abc123"
  }'
const res = await fetch('https://api.ailyn.app/v1/chat', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Authorization': `Bearer ${API_KEY}`,
    'Content-Type': 'application/json'
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
    message: 'How do I reset my password?',
    conversation_id: 'conv_abc123'
  })
});
const data = await res.json();
{
  "id": "msg_x7k9p2",
  "conversation_id": "conv_abc123",
  "role": "assistant",
  "content": "To reset your password, go to Settings...",
  "created_at": "2026-04-01T12:00:00Z",
  "tokens_used": 142
}

Inbox API

GET /v1/inbox

List all conversations with pagination and filters.

Query ParamTypeDescription
statusstring?open | closed | all
limitnumber?Results per page (default 20, max 100)
cursorstring?Pagination cursor
cURL
JavaScript
Response
curl https://api.ailyn.app/v1/inbox?status=open&limit=10 \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ak_xxxx"
const res = await fetch('https://api.ailyn.app/v1/inbox?status=open&limit=10', {
  headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${API_KEY}` }
});
const data = await res.json();
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "conv_abc123",
      "contact": "Maria Lopez",
      "channel": "widget",
      "status": "open",
      "last_message": "How do I upgrade?",
      "updated_at": "2026-04-01T11:30:00Z"
    }
  ],
  "next_cursor": "cur_n8x2m",
  "has_more": true
}

CRM API

GET /v1/crm/:name

Search contacts by name, email, or phone. Returns matching CRM records.

Path ParamTypeDescription
namestringSearch query (name, email, or phone)
cURL
JavaScript
Response
curl https://api.ailyn.app/v1/crm/maria \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ak_xxxx"
const res = await fetch('https://api.ailyn.app/v1/crm/maria', {
  headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${API_KEY}` }
});
const data = await res.json();
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "ct_m3k9",
      "name": "Maria Lopez",
      "email": "maria@example.com",
      "phone": "+52 55 1234 5678",
      "tags": ["premium", "active"],
      "conversations": 12,
      "created_at": "2026-01-15T08:00:00Z"
    }
  ]
}

Activity API

GET /v1/activity

Retrieve recent activity feed: messages, events, automations, and system actions.

Query ParamTypeDescription
typestring?message | automation | system | all
sincestring?ISO 8601 timestamp filter
limitnumber?Results per page (default 50, max 200)
cURL
JavaScript
Response
curl https://api.ailyn.app/v1/activity?type=automation&limit=5 \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ak_xxxx"
const res = await fetch('https://api.ailyn.app/v1/activity?type=automation&limit=5', {
  headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${API_KEY}` }
});
const data = await res.json();
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "ev_p2x8",
      "type": "automation",
      "action": "send_followup",
      "target": "Maria Lopez",
      "status": "completed",
      "timestamp": "2026-04-01T10:15:00Z"
    }
  ]
}

Actions API

POST /v1/actions/:id/execute

Trigger a pre-configured automation action. Actions are created in the dashboard.

ParameterTypeDescription
idstring (path)Action ID from dashboard
paramsobject?Dynamic parameters for the action
targetstring?Contact ID or conversation ID
cURL
JavaScript
Response
curl -X POST https://api.ailyn.app/v1/actions/act_followup/execute \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ak_xxxx" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "target": "ct_m3k9",
    "params": { "template": "welcome_back" }
  }'
const res = await fetch('https://api.ailyn.app/v1/actions/act_followup/execute', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Authorization': `Bearer ${API_KEY}`,
    'Content-Type': 'application/json'
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
    target: 'ct_m3k9',
    params: { template: 'welcome_back' }
  })
});
const data = await res.json();
{
  "id": "exec_z8p3",
  "action_id": "act_followup",
  "status": "queued",
  "estimated_at": "2026-04-01T12:01:00Z"
}

Webhooks

Receive real-time notifications when events happen in Ailyn. Configure webhooks in Dashboard → Settings → Webhooks.

Events

EventDescription
conversation.createdNew conversation started
conversation.closedConversation marked as resolved
message.receivedNew message from a contact
message.sentAI or agent replied
contact.createdNew contact added to CRM
action.completedAutomation action finished

Payload

{
  "event": "message.received",
  "timestamp": "2026-04-01T12:05:00Z",
  "data": {
    "conversation_id": "conv_abc123",
    "message": "I need help with billing",
    "contact": { "id": "ct_m3k9", "name": "Maria Lopez" }
  }
}

Signature Verification

Every webhook includes an X-Ailyn-Signature header. Verify it using HMAC-SHA256 with your webhook secret.

import crypto from 'crypto';

function verifyWebhook(payload, signature, secret) {
  const expected = crypto
    .createHmac('sha256', secret)
    .update(payload)
    .digest('hex');
  return crypto.timingSafeEqual(
    Buffer.from(signature),
    Buffer.from(`sha256=${expected}`)
  );
}

Widget SDK

Add a chat widget to any website with a single line of code. No build tools required.

Quick Start

<!-- Add before </body> -->
<script
  src="https://ailyn-landing.pages.dev/widget.js"
  data-company="your-company-slug"
></script>

Configuration

AttributeDefaultDescription
data-companydemoYour company slug (from dashboard)
data-positionbottom-rightbottom-right or bottom-left
data-color#6366f1Brand color (hex)
data-titleAilynChat header title

Full Example

<script
  src="https://ailyn-landing.pages.dev/widget.js"
  data-company="ailyn-labs"
  data-position="bottom-left"
  data-color="#8b5cf6"
  data-title="Soporte Ailyn"
></script>

JavaScript API

Control the widget programmatically after it loads:

// Open the chat
window.AilynWidget.open();

// Close the chat
window.AilynWidget.close();

// Toggle open/closed
window.AilynWidget.toggle();

// Remove widget from page
window.AilynWidget.destroy();

Rate Limits

API requests are rate-limited per API key. Current limits:

PlanRate LimitBurst
Free20 req/min5 concurrent
Pro100 req/min20 concurrent
Enterprise1000 req/min100 concurrent

Rate limit headers are included in every response:

HeaderDescription
X-RateLimit-LimitMax requests per window
X-RateLimit-RemainingRequests remaining
X-RateLimit-ResetUnix timestamp when window resets
When rate-limited, you receive a 429 Too Many Requests response. Implement exponential backoff in your client.

Built with ♥ by Ailyn — ailyn.app
